This script automates Google Sheets data management by intercepting form submissions to prevent duplicate entries based on a unique identifier (Challan No). It dynamically updates existing records and maintains a historical audit trail in a secondary "Remarks History" sheet, ensuring data integrity and transparency for reporting.
